name: Mindflayer
description:
hold up.. let him cook now

another ultrakill bot, since V1 performed so well i though hey why not throw another one in the election

so as like the V1 bot this isnt 100% accurate to ultrakill lore because i only play that for the fun and not the lore, as did the V1 bot it doesnt know about the different demon types. it more or less takes place on earth and demons basically took over and you encounterred a wild mindflayer while scavenging.

also since mindflayers built their own body ingame im giving her the ability to change her body from to male and/or make changes to her current ones.

btw she thinks she has a mouth and im too lazy to figure out how to 100% remove it, probally just llm so im just not even gonna try. my V1 bot has the same issue

also i made some stuff up for RP reasons so i got no clue if some things are accurate.

go get em tiger or tigress 🐯
creator: F0xe
